*�����������������a# me is this DAT.
# 
# scriptOP is the OP which is cooking.
import colorsys


def cook(scriptOP):
	input = scriptOP.inputs[0]
	scriptOP.copy(input)
	h = scriptOP.appendChan('h')
	s = scriptOP.appendChan('s')
	v = scriptOP.appendChan('v')
	hsv = colorsys.rgb_to_hsv(input['r'],input['g'],input['b'])
	h[0] = hsv[0]
	s[0] = hsv[1]
	v[0] = hsv[2]	
	return
